title: Makhachkala, Dagestan — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Makhachkala, Dagestan: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Makhachkala is a city in Dagestan with a population of 600,000. The capital of Dagestan, a Caspian Sea port city with a rich multicultural heritage and stunning mountain landscapes nearby.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
